welcome:
👋 Hello, {name}!

🤖 **CyberNick AI** is your generator of unique nicknames and passwords!

🎯 **What I can do:**
• 🎮 Generate nicknames in 4 styles
• 🧠 Create via neural networks (ChatGPT)
• 🎨 Generate avatars (Stable Diffusion)
• 🔐 Generate strong passwords
• 📜 Store generation history

⭐ **3 free generations per day!**
💰 10 Stars = 3 additional generations

Choose an action below 👇
generating:
🔄 **Generating unique nickname via AI...**
⏳ Wait 3-5 seconds
nick_result:
🎯 **Your AI nickname:**

`{nick}`

🔐 **Password:** `{password}`

📝 Style: {style}
🧠 Generated by neural network
💾 Saved to history
password_result:
🔐 **Your strong password:**

`{password}`

⚠️ Length: 16 characters
💡 Contains: letters, digits, special characters
💾 Saved to history
no_history: 📭 You have no saved generations yet
limit_exceeded:
❌ Free generations for today are used! (3/3)
Buy additional for ⭐ Stars
payment_success:
✅ **Payment successful!**

You have received **3 generations**.
Thank you for your support! 🚀

You can continue generating nicknames!
